response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 30+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior role, creating a severe seniority mismatch and high flight risk. Java is listed only as a peripheral skill with no recent or substantial Java project experience — the stack is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. German proficiency is only 'Basic', falling short of the required strong verbal and written German. No insurance-sector experience is evident.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background with TDD, CI/CD, and agile craftsmanship experience
Based in Berlin with proven track record on complex architectures and cloud/Kubernetes
Strong teaching/mentoring history (workshops, dojos, courses) showing collaborative mindset
concerns: Massive overqualification for an entry-level junior role — retention and salary-fit risk
German is only 'Basic', below the required strong German for client-facing insurance work
Minimal demonstrable Java experience; primary stack is TS/Node/DLang, not JVM
